title: NEO Residue Report (verifier_residue_report.json / residue_manifest.json)
description: Two-layer residue evidence. Layer 1 = creation manifest. Layer 2 = before/after state-surface snapshot diff. A pass requires manifest cleanup + clean diff on every declared surface + a clean second run.

manifest_cleanup_complete.description: Layer 1: every artifact the verifier intentionally created has been removed.

created_manifest.description: Layer 1 list: files / rows / objects / account-state the verifier created.

state_surfaces.description: Must equal session_contract.state_surfaces. C5 fails on mismatch.

snapshots.description: Layer 2: one entry per declared surface. Each must be diff_clean=true (ignoring volatile_paths).

approved_retained_artifacts.description: Created files deliberately kept because they match contract.residue_keep_paths. These are declared, not residue. Their presence does NOT make diff_clean false.

second_run_pass.description: A second run from a clean state passed again (no carried-over pollution).
